## 📚 Documentation Area

Which documentation needs improvement?
- [ ] README
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Installation guide
- [ ] User guide
- [ ] Developer guide
- [ ] Contributing guide
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔍 Current Issue

What's unclear, missing, or incorrect in the current documentation?

## ✏️ Suggested Improvement

How should this be improved? What would you like to see added or changed?

## 📖 Target Audience

Who is this documentation for?
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] All audiences

## 🎯 Impact

Why is this important?
- [ ] Helps new users get started
- [ ] Clarifies confusing concepts
- [ ] Improves developer experience
- [ ] Reduces support requests
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📝 Additional Context

Any examples, links, or references that would help.

**Spectral Note**: Clear documentation is the map through the legendary realms. Help us guide others on their journey. 📜✨
